title: Pythongirl's Pack
description: A kitchen sink modpack by Pythongirl
body:
!["Pythongirl's Pack" logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9f3e7f6e1ba65933c989fc9c2b725a042bf8bf9.png)

A mod pack that tries to get in all of my old favorite mods and a few new ones.

Runs on Minecraft 1.20.1 with Forge.

## Mods
Focus Mods:
- [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [TARDIS Refined](https://modrinth.com/mod/tardis-refined)

Other major mods:
- [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)
- [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting)
- [Integrated Dynamics](https://modrinth.com/mod/integrated-dynamics)
- [Psi](https://modrinth.com/mod/psi)


<details>
<summary>World Generation Mods</summary>
  
- [Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo)
- [Terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Compatibility Mods</summary>

- [Advanced Peripherals](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancedperipherals) (CC: Tweaked & Applied Energistics 2 & Integrated Dynamics)
- [Applied Botanics](https://modrinth.com/mod/applied-botanics) (Applied Engergistics 2 & Botania)
- [Create: Slice and Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice) (Create & Farmer's Delight)
- [Ducky Peripherals](https://modrinth.com/mod/ducky-periphs) (CC: Tweaked & Hex Casting)
- [Tetra's Delight](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tetras-delight) (Farmer's Delight & Tetra)
</details>




For the full mod list please see the [Versions page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pythongirl-pack/versions). Each version of the modpack has slightly different mods. 

## ComputerCraft Additions
This modpack includes a datapack which adds support for the [Fennel Language](https://fennel-lang.org/) to the computers. Use the `fennel` command to access the Fennel REPL.
